name: Metric Spaces
description: d(x,y) distance. Complete, compact. Baire. Completion. Urysohn, Tietze.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Metric d\npos, sym, triangle"]
    D2["Def: Complete\nCauchy⇒converge"]
    D3["Def: Compact\ncover⇒finite sub"]
    D4["Def: Completion\nX→X̄ isometric"]
    T1["Thm: Compact⇔seq compact\nmetric spaces"]
    T2["Thm: Baire\ncountable int dense"]
    T3["Thm: Completion exists\nunique"]
    T4["Thm: Heine–Borel\nℝⁿ"]
    T5["Thm: Urysohn\nT4 normal"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D1 --> D4
    D3 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D4 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
